summary: Iteration 77 - Tested all backlog features: Supplier Aging Report, Aging Export (PDF/Excel), Trend Comparison, CCTV Monitoring Schedules, CCTV Motion Alerts, and Branch Filter Propagation. All 11 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified via Playwright - both new pages load correctly with all UI elements.

minor.fix_applied: Added missing 'import uuid' in /app/backend/routers/cctv.py - was needed for monitoring-schedules and motion-alerts CRUD

critical_code_review_comments: Supplier Aging Report correctly implements FIFO payment application to oldest invoices
Trend Comparison properly returns 14-day daily_trend for chart rendering
CCTV monitoring-schedules and motion-alerts endpoints are fully functional CRUD
Sidebar has both 'Supplier Aging' (under Finance) and 'Trend Comparison' (under Reports) links

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Both Supplier Aging and Trend Comparison pages verified

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 77 verified all backlog features: 1) GET /api/suppliers/aging-report returns aging data with buckets (0_30, 31_60, 61_90, 90_plus), 2) Export endpoints return PDF/Excel files, 3) GET /api/reports/trend-comparison returns weekly/monthly comparisons with 14-day daily_trend, 4) CCTV monitoring-schedules and motion-alerts CRUD work correctly, 5) SupplierAgingPage.jsx shows summary cards, visual bar, PDF/Excel export buttons, and supplier list, 6) TrendComparisonPage.jsx shows weekly/monthly comparison cards and 14-day trend chart. Fixed missing uuid import in cctv.py.
